Project Liberty 2029 Wiki

Here you will find a blueprint for restoring the foundations of Liberty and Justice, and for
dedicating ourselves to the proposition that a Nation so founded shall not perish from this earth.

Getting Elected Landing Page

Overview

Getting Elected is the first concern.

But having a mandate to execute on parts of ProjectLiberty2029 is essential.

This ProjectLiberty2029 is a grass-roots version of what shall become the actual actions of a winning Democratic Party Project 2029.



All documents formatted and/or identified as Legislation are hereby donated to the public domain.
All authors of such material on this site are hereby notified that work on Legislation shall be in the public domain.
Thank you for your service!

In the case of documents, unless otherwise noted in the document's header, footer, or front-matter, they may be assumed to be shared under a CC 4.0 BY-SA deed.

In the case of other file types (images, pdfs, etc) check the directory containing the file for a licensing text file. Without explicit permissions, all such files should be assumed to be all rights reserved.

For CC 4.0 SA-BY, the suggested attribution is: "Created by {author's names if known} for ProjectLiberty2029.com and ProjectLiberty2029.github.io

Content included under "Source Documents" may be of mixed copyright status. Use caution before copying.
If you learn of items that we should remove, please open an issue, explain the copyright, and we will remove asap.
